title: Request Access
intro_description: The CUNY AI Lab provides CUNY faculty, staff, and students with access to the CAIL Sandbox, our Open WebUI platform—a secure, zero-retention interface for working with AI models.
features: CAIL Sandbox platform with multiple AI models
Domain-specific tools (AmigAI, Transcription Suite, and more)
Zero-retention API services for data privacy
Support from the CUNY AI Lab team

campus.label: CUNY College/Campus
campus.placeholder: e.g., Graduate Center, Hunter College, Baruch

intended_use.label: Intended Use
intended_use.placeholder: Please describe how you plan to use the CAIL Sandbox and the CUNY AI Lab tools (e.g., course integration, research project, language learning, etc.)

privacy_note: Your information will only be used to process your access request and provide support. The CUNY AI Lab follows CUNY's privacy policies and uses zero-retention practices.

next_steps.title: Review
next_steps.description: We review your request within 2-3 business days.

next_steps.title: Approval
next_steps.description: You'll receive an email with login credentials.

next_steps.title: Access
next_steps.description_html: Log in to chat.ailab.gc.cuny.edu

next_steps.title: Support
next_steps.description: Contact us if you need help getting started.

questions_text: Have questions about access or the platform?
questions_link_text: Contact the CUNY AI Lab Team →
